CHANGE_VERSION_DIALOG.TITLE: Change active version
CHANGE_VERSION_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Do you want to change the active document version?
CHANGE_VERSION_DIALOG.BODY:
You can change it again at any time.
Note that if you change it, this will be the default version used in reports, queries, and other system features.

DELETE_DOCUMENT_DIALOG.TITLE: Document deletion
DELETE_DOCUMENT_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: You are about to delete the document {{ fileName }}
DELETE_DOCUMENT_DIALOG.MESSAGE: This action permanently deletes the document from all trials it is linked to.

TRIAL_SCHEDULER.SELECT_DAYS: Select the days to run the trial

UNPROGAM.TITLE: Desprogramar prueba
UNPROGAM.DESCRIPTION: You are about to unschedule trial {{id}} on {{day}}

TRIAL_ACTIONS.REMOVE_TITLE2: You are about to delete trial: {{ paramTitle2 }}
TRIAL_ACTIONS.REMOVE_DESCRIPTION: This action permanently deletes the trial from the system. This action is irreversible.
TRIAL_ACTIONS.CLOSE_TITLE2: You are about to close trial: {{ paramTitle2 }}
TRIAL_ACTIONS.CLOSE_DESCRIPTION: This action permanently ends its lifecycle. All actions will be locked and no further changes will be allowed.
TRIAL_ACTIONS.REACTIVATE_TITLE2: You are about to reactivate trial: {{ paramTitle2 }}
TRIAL_ACTIONS.REACTIVATE_DESCRIPTION: This action restores its lifecycle, re-enabling the actions and statuses for an ongoing trial.
TRIAL_ACTIONS.REOPEN_TITLE2: You are about to reopen trial: {{ paramTitle2 }}
TRIAL_ACTIONS.REOPEN_DESCRIPTION: This action reverts a closure done by mistake, returning it to a state that allows its lifecycle to be completed correctly.

HTTP_ERRORS.TITLE: Error
